meta.name: ABILITY_HEALINGWORD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal a unit at range.
Heal other units in an area at range.

meta.name: ABILITY_CUREWOUNDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal an adjacent unit.
Heal all adjacent units.

meta.name: ABILITY_MALAISE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Weakness on units in an area.
Inflict Weakness and Poison on units in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_OPENWOUNDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
An attack that deals more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

An attack that deals even more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_PRAYER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal units in an area.
Heal units in a larger area. Infinite range.

meta.name: ABILITY_CONVERT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit.
Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit. Non-boss enemies with less than 25% health join your party.

meta.name: ABILITY_CLEANSE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.
Remove all debuffs from units in an area. Those units get +1 [img:divineshield] for each debuff removed.

meta.name: ABILITY_PURGEMEDIC_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Remove all buffs from a unit.
Remove all buffs from a unit. Deal 3 damage to that unit for each unique status effect removed.

meta.name: ABILITY_HERETICMARK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Ostracized 2 on a unit.
Inflict Ostracized 4 on a unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_ZEALOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 [img:divineshield].

Gain +1 [img:divineshield].
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_HASTE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give a unit +10 [img:spd] until the end of its next turn.
Give units in an area +10 [img:spd] until the end of their next turns.

meta.name: ABILITY_RALLY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.
Force units in an area to each attack one of their enemies.

meta.name: ABILITY_BUDDYUP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump to an open tile next to an ally.

Jump to an open tile next to an ally.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_HEALINGFALL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.

Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_RALLYCHARGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash forward, heal a unit and give it a random stat up.
Dash forward, heal a unit and give it 3 random stat ups.

meta.name: ABILITY_REVERSEDAMAGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Reverse the last damage an adjacent unit took.
Reverse the last damage a unit within range took.

meta.name: ABILITY_REBUKE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage to a unit equal to the damage that unit last dealt.
Deal damage to a unit equal to twice the damage that unit last dealt.

meta.name: ABILITY_WISH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area. This spell tracks its target if you directly targeted a unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_WITCHHUNT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.

Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABIITY_FRIENDORFOE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.
An infinitely ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.

meta.name: ABILITY_REVIVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Revive a body to 50% HP and cure one of its injuries.
Revive a body to 100% HP and cure one of its injuries. If it was an enemy, it gets charmed.

meta.name: ABILITY_HOLYLIGHT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.

Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_ETHEREAL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain 4 [img:divineshield], 3 [img:shield], heal 2 HP, and Brace 1.

Gain Thorns 6, Reflect 5, 4 [img:divineshield],
3 [img:shield], heal 2 HP and Brace 1.

meta.name: ABILITY_BORNAGAIN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up, then you fall asleep.

meta.name: ABILITY_BORNAGAIN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up.

meta.name: ABILITY_BENEDICTION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal EVERYTHING for 2 HP.

Heal EVERYTHING for 2 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_CRUSADE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy.
You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy and gain +1 [img:str].

meta.name: ABILITY_HALLOWEDGROUND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a blessing pickup on an empty tile in range.
Spawn a blessing pickup on any empty tile.

meta.name: ABILITY_ENLIGHTEN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Another unit's next spell is free.

Another unit's next spell is free. Infinite range.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_ANOINT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to a random stat to an adjacent unit.
Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to 2 random stats to any unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_EYEFORANEYE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5 and Bleed 1.
A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5, Bleed 1, and Madness 1.

meta.name: ABILITY_WRATHOFGOD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to everything except for a safe circle around you. This vaporizes units it kills.
Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to all enemies. This vaporizes units it kills.

meta.name: ABILITY_ADOUBMENT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Heal a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to a random stat and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

Heal or revive a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to 3 random stats and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

meta.name: ABILITY_DIVINEPROTECTION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Give a unit +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

Give a unit anywhere +1 [img:divineshield] and +2 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

meta.name: ABILITY_CHOSENWARRIOR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Give a unit +1 Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.

Give a unit +1 Damage and +1 Magic Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_SWIFTSERVANT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range, costs less and must target it, and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

meta.name: ABILITY_DIVINEGIFT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain All Stats Up. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Gain All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield]. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_HOLYWEAPON_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to twice the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_STANDIN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Swap positions with any unit. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

Swap positions with any unit and heal it by 1 HP. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

meta.name: ABILITY_AWAKEN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Revive a body to 1 HP.
Revive a body to 1 HP. Give that unit +1 [img:divineshield] and All Stats Up.

meta.name: ABILITY_BAPTISM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times.
Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times. Each heal gives +1 to a random stat.

meta.name: ABILITY_PRAY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give another unit +5 [img:lck] until the end of its next turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_PRAY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give allies +5 [img:lck] and enemies -5 [img:lck] until the end of their next turns, in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_EMERGENCY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.

Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_GUARDIANANGEL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Make a unit The Alpha.
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

Make a unit anywhere The Alpha.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

meta.name: ABILITY_BOOSTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Heal an adjacent unit. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.
Heal a unit at range. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.

meta.name: ABILITY_STIMULANTS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd].
You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd] and +1 [img:int].

meta.name: ABILITY_BLINDINGLIGHT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Inflict Blind 1 on each unit in an area.
Inflict Blind 2 on each unit in a larger area.

meta.name: ABILITY_CIRCLEOFPROTECTION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give +1 [img:divineshield] to each unit within 2 tiles of you.

Give +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Health Regeneration to each unit within 2 tiles of you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_CALLOVER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Make an ally move toward you.
Make an ally move toward you. Infinite range.

meta.name: ABILITY_GRACE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: You or an adjacent unit gains a random positive effect.

meta.name: ABILITY_GRACE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: You or an adjacent unit heals a random amount of HP, gains +1 to a random stat, and gains a random positive effect.

meta.name: ABILITY_TURNFOE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Force a nearby unit to move away from you.
Force a nearby unit to move away from you. If it was an enemy, inflict Madness 1 and Confusion 1.

meta.name: ABILITY_HEALINGSALVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: You or an adjacent unit gains +1 Health Regeneration.
You or an adjacent unit gains +2 Health Regeneration.
